ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PCN-09-292836 Conservatorship of Richard L. Seng.

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Conservator/Trustee.

The Court noted that there was a stipulation filed in the Trust matter and that the Successor Trustee was going to take over. Ms. Ng submitted a revised order on the Trust matter with language that reads as follows: "The Trust shall remain under supervision and review by this Court for one year during administration of Marcia Stewart." With regard to the Conservatorship matter, Ms. Ng stated that there was no overlap in time, explained the extent of services provided and the difficulty in obtaining information from the Conservatee. Both matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
